obtain ⟨⟨⟨x, y, z⟩, hS⟩, hU⟩ := t
    simp only [Subtype.mk.injEq, Prod.mk.injEq] at ht
    obtain ⟨⟨hx, hy⟩, hz⟩ := ht
    have hz' : z = y := by linarith
    have hx' : x = y := by linarith
    simp only [S, Set.mem_setOf_eq] at hS
    have hy' : y = 1 := by
      have : 4 * y * y + y ^ 2 = 4 * k + 1 := by rw [← hx', ← hz'] at hS; exact hS.1
      have : 5 * y ^ 2 = 4 * k + 1 := by ring_nf at this ⊢; linarith
      have hp := hk.out
      have hypos : y > 0 := hS.2.2
      interval_cases y
      · omega
      · simp at this; omega
    have hx'' : x = k := by
      rw [hx', hy', hz'] at hS
      simp at hS
      omega
    simp only [Set.mem_singleton_iff, Subtype.mk.injEq]
    ext <;> simp [hx'', hy', hz', hx']

    simp only [Set.mem_singleton_iff] at ht
    simp only [ht, Subtype.mk.injEq, Prod.mk.injEq, sub_add_cancel, mul_one, and_self]

obtain ⟨⟨⟨x, y, z⟩, hS⟩, hU⟩ := t
    simp only [Subtype.mk.injEq, Prod.mk.injEq] at ht
    obtain ⟨⟨hx, hy⟩, hz⟩ := ht
    have hz' : z = y := by linarith
    have hx' : x = y := by linarith
    simp only [Set.mem_singleton_iff, Subtype.mk.injEq, Prod.mk.injEq]
    simp [S] at hS
    have hS1 := hS.1
    rw [hz', hx'] at hS1
    have : 4 * y * y + y ^ 2 = 4 * k + 1 := hS1
    have : 5 * y ^ 2 = 4 * k + 1 := by ring_nf; ring_nf at this; linarith
    have hy_pos : 0 < y := hS.2.2
    have : y = 1 := by
      have h5 : (5 : ℤ) * y ^ 2 = 4 * k + 1 := this
      have hprime := hk.out
      have hdvd : y ∣ (4 * k + 1 : ℤ) := by
        use 5 * y
        linarith
      have hdvd' : y.natAbs ∣ (4 * k + 1) := by
        rw [Int.natAbs_dvd]
        exact hdvd
      have := Nat.Prime.eq_one_or_self_of_dvd hprime y.natAbs hdvd'
      rcases this with h1 | h2
      · omega
      · have : 5 * (4 * k + 1)^2 = 4 * k + 1 := by
          calc 5 * (4 * k + 1)^2 = 5 * y.natAbs ^ 2 := by rw [h2]
            _ = 5 * y ^ 2 := by rw [sq_abs]
            _ = 4 * k + 1 := by linarith
        have : (4 * k + 1) * (5 * (4 * k + 1) - 1) = 0 := by ring_nf; linarith
        have hpos : 0 < 4 * k + 1 := by omega
        have : 5 * (4 * k + 1) - 1 = 0 := by nlinarith
        omega
    refine ⟨?_, this, this⟩
    have : 5 * 1 ^ 2 = 4 * k + 1 := by rw [← this]; exact ‹5 * y ^ 2 = 4 * k + 1›
    omega
  · intro ht
    simp only [Set.mem_singleton_iff] at ht
    simp only [ht, sub_self, zero_add, mul_one, Subtype.mk.injEq, Prod.mk.injEq, and_self]

obtain ⟨⟨⟨x, y, z⟩, hS⟩, hU⟩ := t
    simp only [Subtype.mk.injEq, Prod.mk.injEq] at ht

    have hy : y = 1 := by linarith

    have hx : x = k := by
